arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts La Liga title winner after Real Madrid stumble & Barcelona win
arts.sum: La Liga looks to be a three-horse title race contested by fierce rivals Barcelona, Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Barcelona eye cash boost as Manchester City track former star
arts.sum: Barcelona could pick up a cash windfall this summer if Sporting Lisbon opt to sell Francisco Trincao ahead of the 2025/26 season. The Portugal international has impressed in the two seasons since he joined the club on a permanent transfer including a league title win in 2024. His stock continues to rise, with his contract […] The post Barcelona eye cash boost as Manchester City track former star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Three talking points from Barcelona 4-0 Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Dani Olmo was back in the starting XI against Real Sociedad and put on a show as Hansi Flick’s side cruised to victory. 10 - Dani Olmo has been directly involved in 10 goals in just 12 starts for FC Barcelona in all competitions (5 goals, 5 assists), providing 2 assists in the same game for the second time for the Azulgrana (24 appearances).
